subject: Stufful, a small bear-like Pokemon with a pink-and-beige body and darker face markings, seated among autumn foliage
description: A small, plush-looking bear-like creature sits upright and faces forward against a dense backdrop of vivid red and orange autumn leaves. The creature has a round pale-pink body, small ears with darker tips, and a contrasting darker mask-like patch around its face. Its stubby limbs hang down in a relaxed, seated pose. The reverse-holofoil treatment adds a shimmer layer to the background. The overall impression is of a soft, huggable toy set against a fiery seasonal color palette — cute against dramatic.
foreground: Small bear-like creature seated, facing viewer
background: Dense autumn leaves in red and orange
